name: Brand X Lifestyle Corp.
summary: Brand X Lifestyle Corp. does not have significant operations. The company intends to evaluate and invests in early-stage to mid-level emerging growth companies. Previously, it was involved in acquiring and investing in companies that operate in the blockchain technology industry. The company was formerly known as Block X Capital Corp. and changed its name to Brand X Lifestyle Corp. in March 2020. Brand X Lifestyle Corp. was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
